desc: headless PAEUnderwater t=0 displacement flow (x,y,dx,dy) via dot-grid centroid tracking; ground-truth for RefractV2 decode

refractv2_decode.packing: Per octave A endpoints: c00=phA+axA*scale+ayA*px (P9.x); c10=phA+axA*py+ayA*px (P9.z); c01=phA+axA*scale+ayA*mm (P14.x); c11=phA+axA*py+ayA*mm (P14.z). argA(U,V)=bilerp(c00,c10,c01,c11;U,V)*2pi; offX=sum sinA*ampWeight. scale=Size*0.1 (const@0x268c50=0.1); px,py,mm from M pixel-transform rows /scale.

validation.note: corner-lerp (bilinear phase ramp) form reproduces FCP flow at 0.36-0.64px RMS, 0.88-0.97 spatial corr, gain stable ~47 across Size, scale ratio ~1/2 confirms scale∝Size. STRUCTURE CONFIRMED vs real headless flow.
